name: Princess Moana 'How Far I'll Go' Kids' Throw Blanket - The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™
description: Your young Moana fan will love snuggling up under this Princess Moana "How Far I'll Go" Kids' Throw Blanket from The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™. Made from knit recycled polyester fabric with polyester backing, this throw blanket features a Moana-themed print with ocean currents, a boat and stars for a fan-favorite look. Great for tossing on their bed or armchair with other Disney-themed blankets and pillows, it'll help them stay warm and cozy as they read a book or get ready for bed.
